education_requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field from an accredited 4 year university with a 3.0 to 4.0 GPA
key_responsibilities: Participate in the Engineering Development Program
Engage in learning through coding challenges and projects
Communicate effectively in verbal and written formats
relevant_data: Veeva Systems is a public benefit corporation providing cloud-based software for the life sciences industry.
Recent achievement: Reached a $3 billion revenue run rate in early 2025.
Veeva’s Clinical Database enhances data cleaning speed by up to 50%.
Company culture has mixed reviews with positives regarding remote work options and areas needing improvement in leadership and team dynamics.
